Nubs Nob (Harbor Springs).conditions: Mother Nature and Nubs Groomers teamed up today for the perfect Red and Blue loop experience . Blue bird sky , perfect corduroy, and SO MUCH SNOW!

nubsNob.xcTrails: Trails will be groomed and tracked again this morning. Conditions are very good with a deep base.
nubsNob.comments: It feels like the middle of a perfect winter at Nub's. There is snow everywhere and conditions are phenomenal. The dumping of snow over the last few days is groomed into the base and the snow surface is top shelf conditions. The glades are still covered in fresh snow. The XC trails will be groomed again this morning, conditions are a little soft but the skiing should be very good. The lifts will spin from 9:00 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. today. Make it a great day at Nub's Nob.
